name: Albert Collins
description: American blues musician, recording artist, songwriter (1932–1993)
abstract: Albert Gene Collins (October 1, 1932 – November 24, 1993) was an American electric blues guitarist and singer with a distinctive guitar style. He was noted for his powerful playing and his use of altered tunings and a capo.

concerts.label: American Guitar Heroes: Genuine House-Rockin' Music: Roy Buchanan/Lonnie Mack/Albert Collins
Blue Note Records and WBGO Benefit Jazz Concert

about_quotes.speaker: Red Holloway
about_quotes.evidence: Albert Collins and Albert King, and all these blues players I used to work with years ago.
about_quotes.doc_title: Red Holloway interviewed by Monk Rowe and Michael Woods, Scottsdale, Arizona, March 4, 1995

about_quotes.speaker: David Torkanowsky
